sql_array: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, username VARCHAR(50), created_by VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO users (id, username, created_by) VALUES (1, 'testuser', CURRENT_USER);
UPDATE users SET created_by = CURRENT_USER WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, username, created_by FROM users WHERE created_by = CURRENT_USER;
SELECT CURRENT_USER, COUNT(*) FROM users GROUP BY created_by;
